title: crataegus oxyacantha var. macrocarpa
intro: Crataegus oxyacantha var. macrocarpa, also known as the large-fruited hawthorn, is a variety of the hawthorn plant species, which is a flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiovascular-protective effects. The health benefits of Crataegus oxyacantha var. macrocarpa include reducing blood pressure, improving heart health, and preventing cardiovascular disease. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, are commonly used to support cardiovascular health and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia.
